title: Air-raid shelter am Weinberg
description: Air-raid shelter am Weinberg (Bunker am Weinberg) in Kassel is a World War II air raid shelter built end of the 1930s.

title: Berliner Tor deep bunker
description:

title: Bundesbank bunker
description: The Bundesbank bunker was the German central bank's bunker in Cochem (Rheinland-Pfalz) for the preservation of an emergency currency. From 1964 to 1988, the Deutsche Bundesbank stored up to 15 billion marks in the top-secret facility, to protect West Germany from a national economic crisis in the event of potential hyperinflation that might be caused by the Cold War.

title: Falkenhagen Bunker
description:

title: Führerbunker

title: Harnekop Nuclear Bunker

Built over a 5-year period starting in 1971, the structure was the main bunker for the East German Ministry of National Defence and the National People's Army in case of a nuclear attack on the country.

title: Heiligengeistfeld

title: Lübschützer Teiche Stasi Bunker

It was never used for its intended purpose.

title: Maybach I and II
